name: @emilia-protocol/crash-test
description: The EMILIA crash test: one command shows a high-value disbursement blocked, dual-approved by two named humans on their own devices, issued as an authorization receipt, then verified OFFLINE six months later with EMILIA gone — and a forged copy rejected. Produces an audit-grade Auditor Workpaper Package. Runs the real EP-QUORUM-v1 predicate.
